main.description: Includes pricing/payment terms and x402 endpoint for issuing a receipt against an accept.

cost.description: Numeric price (integer or float) per the chosen frequency.

prepay.description: Whether payment is required before compute starts.

url.description: x402 payment endpoint URL. To settle payment the requester first mints a com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.accepts.x402 record, then issues an x402-gated GET to `{url}/{accepts.x402 AT-URI}/{accepts.x402 CID}`; on payment the bidder mints and returns a com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.receipts.x402 proof-of-payment record. That receipt is then used as the payload of the higher-level com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.accept.

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over these payment terms. Must include the bidder's inline signature, attached at creation, so the advertised price and payment endpoint are non-repudiable.
